error_signature: newly uploaded Excel files not appearing in the list
title: New Excel files not visible in Google Sheets Trigger
symptom: Newly uploaded Excel files do not appear in the dropdown list of the Google Sheets trigger. Only previously existing files are shown.
applies_when: New Excel files uploaded to Google Drive
not_this_if: Files are converted to Google Sheets format
Existing files are visible in the trigger
root_cause: The Google Sheets Trigger may not recognize Excel files (.xlsx) unless they are converted to Google Sheets format. Additionally, the credentials used may not have the necessary permissions to access newly uploaded files.
fix_steps: Convert the newly uploaded Excel file to Google Sheets format.
Check the credentials used for the Google Sheets Trigger and ensure they have access to the new file.
Try refreshing the trigger to see if the new file appears.
agent_instruction: Convert the Excel file to Google Sheets format and verify the trigger credentials.
